data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Design elements are sized and positioned to minimize the effort to reach them.
data.technical_spec: Button placements and size optimized for both mobile and web interactions.

data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Interfaces are streamlined to reduce decision-making time for users.
data.technical_spec: Simplified UI/UX minimizing options per screen.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Focus on creating visually pleasing interfaces which enhance perceived usability.
data.technical_spec: Use of modern design systems like Material Design and UIKit.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Designs adhere to the principle that people spend most of their time on other sites.
data.technical_spec: UI conventions similar to other popular social platforms for ease of use.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Elements are grouped to signal relatedness, simplifying navigation.
data.technical_spec: Effective use of whitespace and grouping in UI layout.
